_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Lead planning efforts with other DOD and non-DOD cyberspace operations partners.
reference_document_element_description: Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, methodology alignment, and stakeholder communication across business units.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-003 (DG, cosine: 0.456), LS-T-003 (LS, cosine: 0.433).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.382). Shared vocabulary: [lead]. DCWF-only terms [cyberspace, dod, efforts, non, operations, partners] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, across, alignment, analytical, business, communication] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.868, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Lead planning efforts with other DOD and non-DOD cyberspace operations partners." and "Lead complex cross-functional analytical projects, coordinating data access, met" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.467 > STS 0.382 (gap +0.086). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [lead] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [lead]. DCWF-only: [cyberspace, dod, efforts, non, operations, partners]. WIDAI-only: [access, across, alignment, analytical, business, communication].
